isolation.testingTool: Shell command execution (grep, go test, go build)
isolation.isolationNote: No isolation needed - code inspection and tests are read-only

steps.action: Read internal/adapters/native/tools_coagent.go to verify tool registration
steps.expected: NewCoAgentTools() returns 5 tools: spawn_agent, post_message, read_messages, wait_for_message, close_agent
steps.observed: NewCoAgentTools() correctly returns all 5 channel tools with proper parameter definitions

steps.action: Run go build ./... to verify compilation
steps.observed: Build completed successfully with exit code 0
Test passed (included in go test output)

evidence.details: All five new channel tools are correctly registered in NewCoAgentTools() function with proper JSON schema definitions and handler implementations

steps.action: Search internal/adapters/native/ for old tool names: send_turn, steer_session, list_sessions
steps.expected: Zero matches found in tool registration code
steps.observed: grep returned exit code 1 (no matches found) - old tools are completely removed

steps.action: Verify no references exist via ripgrep

evidence.details: Comprehensive search across internal/adapters/native/ directory confirmed zero references to legacy coagent tools

steps.expected: Channel message passing tests pass: posting messages, reading back with correct content/sender/role, maintaining order, interleaving from different senders
steps.observed: All channel tests passed including TestAgentChannelPostAndReadPreservesOrder, TestAgentChannelCursorReadsOnlyNewMessages, TestAgentChannelConcurrentPosts
Test passed - messages posted from worker-1, checker-1, worker-1 are read back in exact order
Test passed - cursor correctly tracks position and returns only new messages
Test passed - 32 concurrent posts from 4 agents maintain message integrity

evidence.details: All 8 channel-related tests passed: TestChannelManagerUsesWorkIDKey, TestAgentChannelPostAndReadPreservesOrder, TestAgentChannelCursorReadsOnlyNewMessages, TestAgentChannelWaitTimeoutAndDelivery, TestAgentChannelConcurrentPosts, TestAgentChannelCloseUnblocksWaiters, TestAgentChannelPostAfterCloseFails, TestNewCoAgentToolsRegistersChannelTools

steps.expected: TestAgentChannelWaitTimeoutAndDelivery passes with both timeout and delivery subtests
wait_for_message returns timeout indication when no message arrives within 25ms deadline
steps.observed: Test passed - Wait() returned context.DeadlineExceeded error with empty messages and cursor 0

steps.expected: wait_for_message returns message promptly when posted before 1s deadline
steps.observed: Test passed - Wait() received message posted after 20ms delay, returned correct content and cursor

evidence.details: TestAgentChannelWaitTimeoutAndDelivery with subtests 'timeout' and 'delivery' both passed, confirming correct timeout behavior (25ms timeout triggers DeadlineExceeded) and prompt delivery behavior (message posted after 20ms is delivered within 1s deadline)

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. New channel tools (spawn_agent, post_message, read_messages, wait_for_message, close_agent) are correctly registered. Old tools (send_turn, steer_session, list_sessions) are completely removed. Channel message passing tests verify ordering, cursor-based reading, concurrent posting, and wait/timeout behavior all function correctly.
